creator: Christopher.davidson@gmail.com
text:
Baptiste,

I went through the install again and again am receiving this odd "file not found" for this package build

Steps done:
1. Wiped out the whole /usr/ports tree
2. Re-downloaded the whole /usr/ports tree using this command: git pull https://git.freebsd.org/ports.git /usr/ports
3. cd /usr/ports/multimedia/jellyfin


Receive the same error message again.

I do understand that you are not able to re-create this in your environment, is there a possibility you could share your commands, to remove any variations that I may have in my execution.

Thank you in advance

Chris
